task.description: Configure the deploy token, then push.

message.text: Set GITHUB_TOKEN and push the branch.

tool_call.name: Bash

args.command: export GITHUB_TOKEN=[REDACTED] && git push origin main

tool_call.result: Branch 'main' set up to track remote branch. Everything up-to-date.

message.text: Pushed. The token was redacted at capture time.
